queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigate the empirical relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Analyze the statistical impact of checking account balances below zero on the mitigation of credit risk and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Examine the determinants of default regarding loan purposes for used car purchases and their influence on decreased credit risk.
